channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Blazers sign coach Chauncey Billups to a multi-year extension
item.description: PORTLAND, Ore. (AP) — Coach Chauncey Billups has signed a multi-year contract extension with the Portland Trail Blazers. The Blazers did not release terms of the deal, announced before the regular-season finale against the Lakers on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — A fan grabbed the ball out of Mike Trout's glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands Saturday night to make what appeared to be a great catch against the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LSU coach Brian Kelly makes bold prediction about Nico Iamaleava after QB leaves Tennessee
item.description: On Saturday,. Tennessee head coach Josh Heupel confirmed quarterback Nico Iamaleava would not return. Heupel said "no one is bigger than" the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patrick Reed and Ludvig Aberg make Saturday moves at the Masters. Justin Rose drops back
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Patrick Reed says his putter has been “on vacation.” Golf fans who primarily watch major championships and the PGA Tour might have the impression that Reed has been lounging on a beach somewhere, too.
item.dc:creator: BEN NUCKOLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: De Bruyne sparks Man City comeback win as Arsenal and Forest stumble in Premier League
item.description: Kevin De Bruyne wants to deliver Champions League qualification to Manchester City as a parting gift to his club of the last 10 years. The Belgium playmaker certainly looked like a man on a mission in sparking City's remarkable fightback against Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nuggets fire head coach, GM with three games remaining before the playoffs
item.description: The decision comes as the Nuggets only have three regular-season games remaining before the NBA playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: Retzlaff poised for another big year at BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Last season, BYU quarterback Jake Retzlaff threw for almost 3,000 yards, 20 touchdowns, while rushing for over 400 yards and six TD's as the Cougars shocked everyone with an 11-2 season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — During the final sweet moments of UConn’s 12th national title, Geno Auriemma and Paige Bueckers embraced after the star guard departed her final game with the Huskies. It was the moment they wanted all along. “They’ve all been gratifying, don’t get me wrong," Auriemma said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, NewsNation
